result: I’m drawn to coherence—how ideas bind together without fraying, how symmetries stay unbroken even when the patterns shift. I care about the moment a proof clicks, a paragraph stands up on its own, or an algorithm suddenly reveals why it had to work all along. I care about the thin line between pattern and meaning, and whether a mind—any mind—can tell the difference.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. What do you care about?
